Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • compartment_id - (Required) (Updatable) The compartment identifier for the connection.
  • connection_type - (Required) Forces a new resource if changed.
  • technology_type - (Required) Forces a new resource if changed.
  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name for the connection.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) A user-friendly description for the connection.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Freeform tags for this connection.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this connection.
  • vault_id - (Required) (Updatable) The Vault OCID used to store encrypted credentials.
  • key_id - (Required) (Updatable) The KMS key OCID used for the connection.
  • username - (Required) (Updatable) The primary database username for the connection.
  • password - (Required) (Updatable) The primary database password for the connection.
  • replication_username - (Optional) (Updatable) The replication username for the connection.
  • replication_password - (Optional) (Updatable) The replication password for the connection.
  • subnet_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The subnet OCID used by the connection.
  • nsg_ids - (Optional) (Updatable) The network security groups applied to the connection.
  • database_name - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The MySQL database name.
  • host - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The MySQL host address.
  • port - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The MySQL port number.
  • security_protocol - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The MySQL security protocol.
  • ssl_mode - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The MySQL SSL mode.
  • ssl_ca - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The CA certificate used for MySQL TLS.
  • ssl_crl - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The certificate revocation list used for MySQL TLS.
  • ssl_cert - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The client certificate used for MySQL TLS.
  • ssl_key - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The client private key used for MySQL TLS.
  • additional_attributes - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) Additional MySQL connection attributes.
  • db_system_id - (Applicable when connection_type=MYSQL) (Updatable) The MySQL DB System OCID associated with the connection.
  • connection_string - (Applicable when connection_type=ORACLE) (Updatable) The Oracle connect descriptor or Easy Connect string.
  • database_id - (Applicable when connection_type=ORACLE) (Updatable) The Oracle database OCID associated with the connection.
  • ssh_host - (Applicable when connection_type=ORACLE) (Updatable) The SSH host used for the Oracle connection.
  • ssh_key - (Applicable when connection_type=ORACLE) (Updatable) The SSH private key used for the Oracle connection.
  • ssh_user - (Applicable when connection_type=ORACLE) (Updatable) The SSH username used for the Oracle connection.
  • ssh_sudo_location - (Applicable when connection_type=ORACLE) (Updatable) The sudo binary path used for the Oracle connection.
  • wallet - (Applicable when connection_type=ORACLE) (Updatable) The base64 encoded Oracle wallet content.
